answer:
**Manusmṛti, Chapter 12** (verses Mn_11.49–51) catalogues these precise karmic disfigurements as visible marks from unexpiated sins, in the context of penances.[^1]

> A gold thief obtains diseased nails; a liquor-drinker, black teeth; a slayer of a Brahmana, consumptive disease; and a defiler of a guru's bed, skin disease. // Mn_11.49[48M] //[^2]
> 
> A slanderer obtains a stinking nose; an informer, a stinking mouth; a grain-thief, a deficient limb; and an adulterator, a superfluous one. // Mn_11.50[49M] //[^3]
> 
> A food-thief obtains indigestion; a speech-thief, muteness; a **clothes-thief, vitiligo**; and a **horse-thief, lameness**. // Mn_11.51[50M] //[^4]

A parallel catalogue appears in **Viṣṇu Smṛti, Chapter 45** (Vi_45.4–14), introduced as marks on humans who have passed through animal births after hell.[^5]

> A liquor-drinker becomes one with **black teeth**. // Vi_45.4 //[^6]
> 
> A gold-thief becomes one with **bad nails**. // Vi_45.5 //[^7]
> 
> [...]
> 
> A slanderer becomes one with a **foul-smelling nose**. // Vi_45.7 //[^8]
> 
> [...]
> 
> A stealer of clothes becomes one with **vitiligo**. // Vi_45.13 //[^9]
> 
> A stealer of a horse becomes **lame**. // Vi_45.14 //[^10]

[^1]: Manusmṛti, *Chapter 12*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/12/translation/#p-94d7e1).
[^2]: Manusmṛti, *Chapter 12*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/12/translation/#p-3e6ead).
[^3]: Manusmṛti, *Chapter 12*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/12/translation/#p-0dfd49).
[^4]: Manusmṛti, *Chapter 12*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/12/translation/#p-a549f5).
[^5]: Viṣṇu Smṛti, *Chapter 45*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/45/translation/#p-09d76c).
[^6]: Viṣṇu Smṛti, *Chapter 45*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/45/translation/#p-775026).
[^7]: Viṣṇu Smṛti, *Chapter 45*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/45/translation/#p-7d5c3a).
[^8]: Viṣṇu Smṛti, *Chapter 45*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/45/translation/#p-343f82).
[^9]: Viṣṇu Smṛti, *Chapter 45*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/45/translation/#p-fc8a10).
[^10]: Viṣṇu Smṛti, *Chapter 45*, [paragraph](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/45/translation/#p-a5cf34).

args.query: "clothes thief" OR "garment thief" vitiligo OR "white skin" OR leprosy
